B1.name: Recommendation / Ranking Engine
completedDeliverables: recommendation-service.ts: getCandidates, applyHardFilters, scoreCandidate, applyExploration, applyDiversity, assignConfidenceLabel, buildExplanationFacts, buildExplanationText, generateFeed
GET /feed: full ranking pipeline with persona snapshot integration
Elastic feed sizing (default 6, range 3-8)
UCB-style exploration with cap of 2 exploration cards
Strict diversity pass across pillar, time_shape, social_mode, and price_band
Confidence label mapping: new, learning, strong_match
Structured explanation facts per card
AI-polished explanation text via polishExplanation()
24 recommendation-service unit tests + 7 feed endpoint tests

B2.name: Persona Logic / Feedback / Learning Engine
completedDeliverables: feedback-service.ts: processAction, shouldPromoteHardFilter, getPersonaView, applyPersonaEdits
POST /actions: Zod validation, action processing with persona delta
GET /persona: plain-language persona view with projections, hard filters, boost state
PATCH /persona: editable projections and hard-filter toggles
Ambiguity-first negative logic: Pass applies discounted weight at low confidence, contradiction amplification at high confidence
Circumstantial no-penalty logic: Can't applies zero weight
Contradiction-aware decay: im_in overrides stale negatives at 1.5x, pass overrides positives at 1.5x
decayPreferences(): configurable decay factor for scheduled jobs
Hard-filter auto-promotion after repeated negative signals
Attached follow-up eligibility: queries learning service after Pass/Can't
learning-service.ts: selectNextQuestion, ingestAnswer, checkSessionCap, updateCadence, markPushTTL, expireStalePushNudges
Learning selector scoring: expected lift first via DB order
Shared learning budget with standalone vs attached count tracking
60-minute TTL enforcement for push learning nudges via markPushTTL()
Comparative-question relative boost mapping: winner gets +0.15, loser stays neutral
Question generation fallback via AI service when no DB templates match
Immediate persona update and feedStale flag from learning answers
16 learning-service tests + 11 feedback-service tests + 6 actions/8 persona endpoint tests

B3.name: AI Layer / Chat / Persona Boost
completedDeliverables: ai-service.ts: mock LLM with generateChatReply, startPersonaBoost, getBoostStatus
Mock LLM: keyword-based preference extraction for food/outdoor/music/negative categories
POST /chat-messages: Zod validation, chat reply with persona extraction events
POST /persona-boost-start: Zod validation (email+consent), creates 3 mock inferences, updates boostState
GET /persona-boost-status: returns boost state + inferences from DB
polishExplanation(): template-based explanation polishing from structured reason facts
generateLearningQuestion(): LLM-generated question fallback with 6 topic templates
Schema validation: all AI outputs typed, never write state directly
23 AI service unit tests + endpoint tests
